title: Design System: KET — ระบบบันทึกความประพฤตินักเรียน

display.purpose: One per page — the h1 that identifies the current section.

headline.purpose: Wizard step titles, major form section headings.

title.purpose: Card headers, table section titles, sidebar section names.

body.purpose: All prose, form values, table cell content.

label.purpose: All UPPERCASE section labels, table headers, stat card eyebrows, breadcrumbs. IBM Plex Mono required.

shadows.name: button-primary-hover
shadows.purpose: Primary button hover — slightly more lift.

shadows.name: stat-card-hover
shadows.purpose: Stat card hover. Near-invisible indigo glow.

motion.name: micro
motion.purpose: Nav item, button, input border transitions.

motion.name: wizard
motion.purpose: Wizard step tick bar progress animation.

breakpoints.name: sidebar-collapse
breakpoints.purpose: Sidebar collapses to icon-only below this.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single call-to-action per view. Used for Save, Create, Submit.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; height: 40px; padding: 0 14px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.01em; white-space: nowrap; color: #ffffff; background: #2563eb; border: 1px solid #2563eb; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(37,99,235,.25); transition: background 0.12s, border-color 0.12s, box-shadow 0.12s, transform 0.06s; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'Noto Sans Thai', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1d4ed8; border-color: #1d4ed8; box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(37,99,235,.35); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0.5px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(37,99,235,0.25); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Low-emphasis action — Cancel, Back, auxiliary operations.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; height: 40px; padding: 0 14px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.01em; white-space: nowrap; color: #0f172a; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #d0d8e6; transition: background 0.12s, border-color 0.12s, transform 0.06s; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'Noto Sans Thai', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #e9edf6; border-color: #b4c0d4; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: translateY(0.5px); }

components.name: Status Chip — Pending
components.description: Workflow state badge for records awaiting approval.
components.html: รอดำเนินการ
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; height: 22px; padding: 0 9px 0 7px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-chip::before { content: ''; width: 5px; height: 5px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-chip-pending { background: #fde9c8; color: #92400e; } .ds-chip-pending::before { background: #d97706; } .ds-chip-approved { background: #d1fae5; color: #065f46; } .ds-chip-approved::before { background: #059669; } .ds-chip-rejected { background: #fee2e2; color: #991b1b; } .ds-chip-rejected::before { background: #dc2626; } .ds-chip-draft { background: #e9edf6; color: #475569; } .ds-chip-draft::before { background: #b4c0d4; }

components.name: Text Input
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .ds-field-label { display: block; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: #475569; margin-bottom: 5px; letter-spacing: 0.01em; font-family: 'Noto Sans Thai', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-req { color: #dc2626; margin-left: 2px; } .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 40px; padding: 0 12px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #d0d8e6; background: #ffffff; font-size: 13.5px; color: #0f172a; font-family: 'Noto Sans Thai', system-ui, sans-serif; transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #b4c0d4; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #2563eb; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(37,99,235,0.15); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Primary content container. White surface on paper background.
components.html:
บันทึกความประพฤติ

เนื้อหาภายในการ์ด
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e4e9f2; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 14px 22px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e4e9f2; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.005em; color: #0f172a; font-family: 'Noto Sans Thai', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-body { padding: 20px 22px; }

components.name: Navigation Item
components.description: Sidebar nav link — rest, hover, and active states.
components.html: แดชบอร์ดบันทึกข้อความ
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 8px 10px; border-radius: 6px; color: #475569; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 400; position: relative; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.1s, color 0.1s; text-decoration: none; font-family: 'Noto Sans Thai', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #e9edf6; color: #0f172a; } .ds-nav-active { background: #eff5ff; color: #1e3a8a; font-weight: 500; } .ds-nav-active::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: -8px; top: 7px; bottom: 7px; width: 3px; background: #2563eb; border-radius: 0 3px 3px 0; } .ds-nav-icon { width: 16px; height: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; color: #7c8aa0; } .ds-nav-active .ds-nav-icon { color: #2563eb; }

narrative.overview:
KET is a governance tool — not a product, not a brand. The UI should feel like a well-printed official form: dense but legible, structured without being rigid, authoritative without being cold. Every screen is a document waiting to be filled out, signed, and filed. The interface removes itself from the equation and lets the work speak.

The system serves school staff who are not technology natives. They open this tool to complete a task — recording an incident, approving a statement, printing a contract — then close it. Speed to task and zero ambiguity are the primary values. Delight is not the goal; trust is.

The color system is restrained: deep indigo as the single accent, tinted gray-blue neutrals for all surfaces, and three semantic status colors (amber, sage, rose) used strictly for workflow state.
keyCharacteristics: Thai-primary language throughout all labels, copy, and error states
Single blue accent (indigo) — never doubled or gradient
Mono for all data: IDs, codes, dates, counts, section labels
Status chips as the only color beyond neutrals + indigo
Flat surfaces with hairline borders; shadows only on interactive elevation

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Indigo (#2563eb) is the only non-neutral, non-status color. It never appears as a gradient, a second hue, or a decorative fill. Its presence always means 'interactive' or 'selected.'

rules.name: The Status Purity Rule
rules.body: Amber, sage, and rose are reserved exclusively for workflow status. They do not appear as decorative accents, background fills, or brand elements.

rules.name: The Mono-for-Data Rule
rules.body: Any value that is machine-generated, numeric, or a code uses IBM Plex Mono. Human-written prose uses Noto Sans Thai. Never mix within the same typographic role.

rules.name: The Uppercase-Only-with-Mono Rule
rules.body: text-transform: uppercase is only applied alongside the mono font and at ≤11px. Never uppercase Thai-primary body text.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No surface carries a shadow at rest. Shadows are a state response (hover, focus, lifted). If adding a shadow to a static card, use a border instead.

rules.name: The Indigo-Tint-Only Rule
rules.body: All shadows use indigo as their tint color, never black. rgba(0,0,0,...) shadows are prohibited.

dos: Do use IBM Plex Mono for all numeric data, IDs, codes, and uppercase section labels.
Do use status chips as the only semantic color beyond indigo.
Do keep all label, copy, and error message text in Thai.
Do use hairline borders (1px, Rule or Rule-2) to separate sections.
Do use Indigo Wash (#eff5ff) as the selected background for rows and active states.
Do keep primary button usage to one per view.
Do tint all shadows toward Indigo.
Do use Page Paper (#f4f6fb) as the app shell background.
donts: Don't use dark mode as the default or primary experience.
Don't use animation, glassmorphism, or gradient text.
Don't add social-media-style elements (avatar feeds, card grids with photos).
Don't add a second accent color beyond Indigo.
Don't uppercase Thai text at body size.
Don't use layout that's too complex — users need their target within 2 clicks.
Don't use border-left colored stripes except the sanctioned sidebar active indicator.
Don't add empty states or onboarding flows — this is not an activation product.
Don't use pure black (#000000) — use Ink (#0f172a).
